description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a mix of brick and gray panel exterior finishes. The house features large floor-to-ceiling windows on both levels, allowing for ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The property is surrounded by a well-manicured hedge and includes a spacious patio area with outdoor furniture, a hammock, and a small pool. There is a driveway with a parked car and a separate garage structure on one side. The landscaping includes a few trees and a wooden fence at the front, enhancing privacy and curb appeal. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and functional outdoor living areas.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, brick and gray panel exteriors, and a landscaped yard with patio, pool, and driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass doors, patio with outdoor seating, and a hedge-enclosed yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, pool area, and a tree near the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the upper terrace, two trees at the entrance, and the car parked in the driveway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the hammock area, additional patio seating, and the full extent of the hedge boundary.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a large glass door, minimal steps, and is framed by two trees and a hedge, with no porch or overhang.
